title: Rich Ruby French Strawberry Tart
description: A show-stopping dessert featuring charred strawberries in a glassy jelly, flambeed to perfection. This pescatarian-friendly tart is sure to impress.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and melted butter to make the crust.
Press the crust mixture into a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake the crust for 20 minutes, or until lightly golden.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, heavy cream, and ruby port wine.
Arrange the sliced strawberries on top of the baked crust.
Pour the egg mixture over the strawberries and smooth the top.
Bake the tart for an additional 25 minutes, or until the edges are set.
Remove the tart from the oven and increase the oven temperature to broil.
Flambe the strawberries with a kitchen torch, or under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, watching carefully to prevent burning.
Allow the tart to cool completely before dusting with confectioners sugar.
